chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B. A. No.582 of 2022 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of bail application ------------------------------ 05.07.2022 Mr. Abdullah Mahar, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG ------------------------------------------- It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that after dismissal of his bail application, the applicant was having a remedy to have sought for his release on bail by filing such application before the learned Sessions Judge having jurisdiction, therefore, if the applicant is permitted to exhaust such remedy, he would not press the disposal of instant bail application before this Court on merits, which is not opposed by learned DPG for the State. In view of above, the instant bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the applicant may exhaust his remedy before learned Sessions Judge, if it is permitted by law. J U D G E
